summary: Project with logo and hero background image features being added.
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Crop to square and remove navy background, keeping only the gold sun and lightning bolt icon on a transparent background (Screenshot_20260228_060558_Chrome~2.jpg > logo.dim_200x200.png)
- Darken overall exposure slightly to work better as a hero background behind white text (1772177297346.png > hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Add the uploaded logo image (gold sun + lightning bolt icon on navy background) to the Header component. Save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.png and display it in the top-left of the navigation bar alongside the brand name.

Replace the current Hero section background with the uploaded photo of the TRI-GITA SERVICES building (1772177297346.png). Save it as frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.png and set it as the full-screen background image of the Hero component, with a dark overlay to ensure text remains legible.

new_feature_requests.summary: Use 2nd image as the hero background
